label: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning

node.label: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning
node.definition: Behavior is learned from demonstrations, or the reward structure explaining demonstrations is inferred.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning is to connect Reinforcement learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI.
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.

dependencies.rationale: Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning follows the learning setup expressed by Reinforcement learning.
Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning uses Labels, targets, rewards & preferences as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Imitation & inverse reinforcement learning uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
